source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race of config.TreatOldVersionUTF8AsUTF8MB4
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
```
WARNING: DATA RACE
Write at 0x000003d4eb51 by goroutine 66:
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testIntegrationSuite).TestIgnoreColumnUTF8Charset()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/db_integration_test.go:1357 +0xdb0
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testIntegrationSuite).TestIgnoreColumnUTF8Charset()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/db_integration_test.go:1349 +0xc6c
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testIntegrationSuite).TestIgnoreColumnUTF8Charset()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/db_integration_test.go:1332 +0x925
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testIntegrationSuite).TestIgnoreColumnUTF8Charset()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/db_integration_test.go:1322 +0x707
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl_test.(*testIntegrationSuite).TestIgnoreColumnUTF8Charset()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/db_integration_test.go:1294 +0x2a8
runtime.call32()
/usr/local/go/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:519 +0x3a
reflect.Value.Call()
/usr/local/go/src/reflect/value.go:308 +0xc0
github.com/pingcap/check.(*suiteRunner).forkTest.func1()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/check@v0.0.0-20190102082844-67f458068fc8/check.go:836 +0x9fc
github.com/pingcap/check.(*suiteRunner).forkCall.func1()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/pkg/mod/github.com/pingcap/check@v0.0.0-20190102082844-67f458068fc8/check.go:730 +0xb7

Previous read at 0x000003d4eb51 by goroutine 181:
github.com/pingcap/tidb/infoschema.ConvertOldVersionUTF8ToUTF8MB4IfNeed()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/infoschema/builder.go:202 +0x3f
github.com/pingcap/tidb/infoschema.(*Builder).applyCreateTable()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/infoschema/builder.go:175 +0xb5
github.com/pingcap/tidb/infoschema.(*Builder).ApplyDiff()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/infoschema/builder.go:95 +0x3c5
github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*Domain).tryLoadSchemaDiffs()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain.go:245 +0x542
github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*Domain).loadInfoSchema()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain.go:109 +0x3dd
github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*Domain).Reload()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain.go:332 +0x1e5
github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain.(*Domain).loadSchemaInLoop()
/home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/domain/domain.go:445 +0x8d8
```

### What is changed and how it works?
The variable of `TreatOldVersionUTF8AsUTF8MB4` only been changed in one test, so I don't want to use `mutex` or `atomic` to fix this race. I just reduce the probability of data race in this PR.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

symptoms: ddl: fix data race of config.TreatOldVersionUTF8AsUTF8MB4
failure_signature: ddl: fix data race of config.TreatOldVersionUTF8AsUTF8MB4
root_cause_explanation: Race detector reported a DATA RACE because the test mutates the global config flag `TreatOldVersionUTF8AsUTF8MB4` while background schema reload/infoschema building reads the same flag. This PR reduces the race window by short-circuiting on `tbInfo.Version` before reading the global config in `ConvertOldVersionUTF8ToUTF8MB4IfNeed`.
fix_pattern: Reduce shared global config access (or make it thread-safe); avoid reading mutable global config in background goroutines when not needed (e.g., check table version first).

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race of config.TreatOldVersionUTF8AsUTF8MB4
